title: Velvety Earthy Prawns Stir-fry
description: A low-sodium-friendly Uruguayan dish featuring tender tiger prawns in a rich, velvety sauce that is both earthy and flavorful.
instructions: Heat a tablespoon of olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add sliced onion and minced garlic to the hot pan. Stir-fry for about 2 minutes until translucent.
Add chopped red bell pepper, chili flakes if using, and stir-fry for another minute.
Increase heat to high, add prawns and pour in Tamari sauce. Stir continuously for about 3-5 minutes or until prawns are cooked through and the sauce has thickened slightly.
Drizzle a little bit of water into the pan to reduce excess moisture from the prawns without making it too soupy.
Remove from heat, add fresh parsley, toss, and serve immediately.
Note: Adjust seasoning with more salt if desired.
